title: feat(theme): add dark mode support
description:
Adds dark mode toggle functionality using React Context.

## Changes
- Created ThemeContext with darkMode state
- Added toggleTheme function for switching modes
- Wrapped app in ThemeProvider

## Testing
- Verified toggle works in UI
- Checked persistence across page reloads

title: fix(api): add auth headers and error handling
description:
Fixes API calls to include authentication and proper error handling.

## Problem
API calls were failing silently without auth headers.

## Solution
- Added Bearer token to all requests
- Created ApiError class for typed errors
- Added response status checking

## Breaking Changes
None - error handling is additive.

+@router.post('/bills/{bill_id}/follow')
+async def follow_bill(
+    bill_id: str,
+    current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
+    db: Session = Depends(get_db)
+):
+    follow = BillFollow(user_id=current_user.id, bill_id=bill_id)
+    db.add(follow)
+    db.commit()
+    return {'status': 'followed'}
title: feat(bills): add follow/unfollow functionality
description:
Allows users to follow bills for updates.

## New Endpoints
- `POST /bills/{id}/follow` - Follow a bill
- `DELETE /bills/{id}/follow` - Unfollow a bill
- `GET /me/followed-bills` - List followed bills

## Database
- Added `bill_follows` table with user_id and bill_id

## Related Issues
Closes #42

diff:
+class RateLimiter:
+    def __init__(self, max_requests: int, window_seconds: int):
+        self.max_requests = max_requests
+        self.window = window_seconds
+        self.requests: Dict[str, List[float]] = {}
+
+    def is_allowed(self, key: str) -> bool:
+        now = time.time()
+        if key not in self.requests:
+            self.requests[key] = []
+        self.requests[key] = [t for t in self.requests[key] if now - t < self.window]
+        if len(self.requests[key]) >= self.max_requests:
+            return False
+        self.requests[key].append(now)
+        return True
title: feat(security): implement rate limiting
description:
Adds sliding window rate limiter for API protection.

## Implementation
- Sliding window algorithm tracks requests per key
- Configurable max requests and time window
- Memory-efficient cleanup of old timestamps

## Usage
```python
limiter = RateLimiter(max_requests=100, window_seconds=60)
if not limiter.is_allowed(client_ip):
    raise HTTPException(429)
```

## Performance
- O(n) cleanup per check, where n = requests in window
- Consider Redis for distributed deployments

title: refactor(bills): improve data fetching with proper state management
description:
Refactors BillList component with better patterns.

## Changes
- Added TypeScript types for bills state
- Implemented loading and error states
- Used useCallback for memoized fetch function
- Added proper dependency tracking in useEffect
- Switched from fetch to api utility for consistency

## Before/After
- Before: Silent failures, no loading state
- After: User sees loading spinner and error messages

## Testing
- Verified loading spinner appears
- Tested error state with network failure
- Confirmed re-fetch on filter change
